victim.value: Three-year-old child named Zack who suffers fatal abuse from his father
victim.quote: My name is Zack,I am three, Tonight my daddy . . .murdered me.

culprit_and_motive.value: Father who murders his three-year-old son, motive unclear but involves anger and abuse
culprit_and_motive.quote: What else could have made daddy so mad?

social_world.value: Dysfunctional family power structure with abusive father as dominant authority figure over helpless child victim
social_world.quote: My name is Zack I am three... What else could have made daddy so mad?
